name: Senate Battleground 2020 (via 314 Action)
subject: Dirty Energy Companies writing BIG checks to Mitch
disclaimer_text: Paid for by 314 Action Fund, [www
body:

| | In his 35 years in Washington, Mitch has received more than $2.3 MILLION from oil and gas interests. Mitch and his PAC have gotten more than $429,000 from the oil and gas industry this year alone. **The fossil fuel industry is POURING money into Kentucky to rescue Mitch McConnell!** [**We 're going to match their DIRTY MONEY with grassroots POWER. We need 489 more grassroots donations to our Senate Battleground Fund -- chip in $20.20 to flip the Senate in 2020 >>**](https://secure.314action.%3D%3D/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/314_monthly_oct_senatebattleground?refcode=314_EM_FR_191014_DirtyEnergyMitch_U1_X1&amount=25&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&city=&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=1+-+Wersquore+going+to+match+their+DIRTY+MON&utm_campaign=314_EM_FR_191014_DirtyEnergyMitch_U1_X1&source=314_EM_FR_191014_DirtyEnergyMitch_U1_X1") [](https://secure.314action.%3D%3D/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/314_monthly_oct_senatebattleground?refcode=314_EM_FR_191014_DirtyEnergyMitch_U1_X1&amount=25&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&city=&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=2&utm_campaign=314_EM_FR_191014_DirtyEnergyMitch_U1_X1&source=314_EM_FR_191014_DirtyEnergyMitch_U1_X1") Senate Republicans and their Dirty Energy donors are getting SPOOKED. **In his 35 years in Washington, "Team Mitch" has received more than $2.3 MILLION from oil and gas interests.** Mitch and his PAC have gotten more than $429,000 from the oil and gas industry _this year alone._ **There 's no way around it. If we don't take the Senate in 2020, Mitch McConnell will KILL any bill to address climate change -- EVEN IF WE BEAT TRUMP!** [**To stay on track, we need 489 more grassroots donations into our Senate Battleground Fund by the mid-month deadline. Can you chip in $20.20 or any amount to help Ditch Mitch and flip the Senate?**](https://secure.314action.%3D%3D/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/314_monthly_oct_senatebattleground?refcode=314_EM_FR_191014_DirtyEnergyMitch_U1_X1&amount=25&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&city=&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=3+-+To+stay+on+track+we+need+489+more+grassr&utm_campaign=314_EM_FR_191014_DirtyEnergyMitch_U1_X1&source=314_EM_FR_191014_DirtyEnergyMitch_U1_X1") [](https://secure.314action.%3D%3D/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/314_monthly_oct_senatebattleground?refcode=314_EM_FR_191014_DirtyEnergyMitch_U1_X1&amount=25&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&city=&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=4&utm_campaign=314_EM_FR_191014_DirtyEnergyMitch_U1_X1&source=314_EM_FR_191014_DirtyEnergyMitch_U1_X1") Thanks to your support, the fight for Senate is getting COMPETITIVE. Compared to just a few months ago, as _NBC News_ reported recently, "The Senate suddenly looks like it's up for grabs." **We 've endorsed Mark Kelly in Arizona. We recruited John Hickenlooper in Colorado. _But we can 't stop there._** With your help, we can get involved in even more races -- giving a GAME-CHANGING EDGE to pro-science candidates in more states. [**That 's what our Senate Battleground Fund is all about, and why we need to stay on track this month. Can you rush a donation to tip the scales in key Senate races, and finally end Mitch McConnell's career?**](https://secure.314action.%3D%3D/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/314_monthly_oct_senatebattleground?refcode=314_EM_FR_191014_DirtyEnergyMitch_U1_X1&amount=25&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&city=&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=5+-+Thatrsquos+what+our+Senate+Battleground+&utm_campaign=314_EM_FR_191014_DirtyEnergyMitch_U1_X1&source=314_EM_FR_191014_DirtyEnergyMitch_U1_X1") | | | [Chip in $31.41 ->](https://secure.314action.%3D/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/314_monthly_oct_senatebattleground?refcode=314_EM_FR_191014_DirtyEnergyMitch_U1_X1&amount=31.41&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&city=&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=6+-+Chip+in+3141+rarr&utm_campaign=314_EM_FR_191014_DirtyEnergyMitch_U1_X1&source=314_EM_FR_191014_DirtyEnergyMitch_U1_X1")

314 Action is a grassroots community of nearly 1 million people working to elect Democratic scientists who will use science and facts to address some of our most pressing issues like climate change and health care. In 2018 we played a pivotal role in flipping the US House of Representatives by electing 9 Democratic scientists to the House and Senate as well as over 100 to key legislative districts while raising over $5.2 million with an average donation of just $27.55. Now we're focused on flipping the US Senate, defeating 25 climate deniers in Congress and flipping key state legislatures across the country.
If you'd like to support 314 Action, you can [click here to make a donation.](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb442a/4bd7760e/4413dbac/77e3e869/2290585895/VEsHAQ/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/314_footer?refcode=emailfooter&amount=31.41&recurring=auto&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=14+-+click+here+to+make+a+donation&utm_campaign=314_EM_FR_191014_DirtyEnergyMitch_U1_X1&source=314_EM_FR_191014_DirtyEnergyMitch_U1_X1")
We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, you can [click here.](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb442a/4bd7760e/4413dbac/77e3e868/2290585895/VEsHAA/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.314action.org/page/s/less-emails?utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=15+-+click+here&utm_campaign=314_EM_FR_191014_DirtyEnergyMitch_U1_X1&source=314_EM_FR_191014_DirtyEnergyMitch_U1_X1")
If you'd like to unsubscribe from all our emails, [click here.](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb442a/4bd7760e/4413dbac/77e3e877/2290585895/VEsHAw/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.314action.org/page/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=16+-+click+here&utm_campaign=314_EM_FR_191014_DirtyEnergyMitch_U1_X1&source=314_EM_FR_191014_DirtyEnergyMitch_U1_X1")

name: Team Yang
subject: Are you in?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
body:
This is a team effort and we need everyone to stand with us. Chip in now so we don’t fall behind.

| [](http://act.yang2020.com/go/68?t=1&akid=1672%2E377263%2EkDQMOI) Yang Gang --

One contribution at a time is how we’re going to win the Democratic nomination. You haven’t pitched in yet, but if we’re going to win, we need every single person in the Yang Gang to step up.

[Can you make your first contribution of $5 or more so that we can take Andrew’s bold solutions to the White house? We’re only 6,359 contributions away from hitting our goal of 40,000 contributions by the time Andrew takes the stage tomorrow. ](https://act.yang2020.com/go/13473?t=13&akid=1672%2E377263%2EkDQMOI)

_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$10 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/13473?t=12&express_lane=true&amount=10&akid=1672%2E377263%2EkDQMOI)
---
| | [$25 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/13473?t=11&express_lane=true&amount=25&akid=1672%2E377263%2EkDQMOI)
---
| [$50 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/13473?t=10&express_lane=true&amount=50&akid=1672%2E377263%2EkDQMOI)
---
| | [$100»](https://act.yang2020.com/go/13473?t=9&express_lane=true&amount=100&akid=1672%2E377263%2EkDQMOI)
---
| [$250 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/13473?t=8&express_lane=true&amount=250&akid=1672%2E377263%2EkDQMOI)
---
| | [OTHER »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/13473?t=7&amount=25&akid=1672%2E377263%2EkDQMOI)
---
When we fall short of our goals, our campaign suffers.

It means we can’t open more offices or hire more organizers in the early primary states. It means we can’t place important digital and TV ads. It means we have to cut back on the things that will win us this election.

[This is a team effort and we need everyone to stand with us. Chip in now so we don’t fall behind. ](https://act.yang2020.com/go/13473?t=6&akid=1672%2E377263%2EkDQMOI)

Thanks for everything,

Team Yang
**Most of our donations come from people like you chipping in small amounts when they can. Your continued generosity helps us keep building this movement.** | [Contribute](https://act.yang2020.com/go/13473?t=14&akid=1672%2E377263%2EkDQMOI)
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We're proud you're part of the Yang Gang! But if you want to receive less email from us, you can do that [here.](https://act.yang2020.com/signup/email-actionkit-feweremails-20190821/?t=2&akid=1672%2E377263%2EkDQMOI) And if you absolutely don't want to hear from us again you can [unsubscribe here.](https://act.yang2020.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=3&akid=1672%2E377263%2EkDQMOI) Contributions or gifts to Friends of Andrew Yang are not tax deductible. | Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eric Holcomb for Indiana
body:
We’ve got great news! Governor Holcomb’s campaign just collected the required amount of state signatures to make the ballot in 2020. | |
---
| [](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=f0979bdf6f1948168de09e81da834802&_e=WZVJ8Pakkk6XXwzp91W_O7r3oESp87OlsoPHMF_7rHpDLMBe-Ol3HEH7leKhk9r9ucyWCWY3KfXt5lL2D21IxgVOl9-8LXmbwj1xludU0L3QDrpGGxwEheuZ5FzXj5KhB7TFrwWdYGHQ3fqI9n0QQPHOnLzgHo3q7U0c4JGNGX0ZX3rIaeaVjaKHoYT9bIPSvibAbRdn7hmP-OV5Hc2mAtQFKuWrrTn2G5OOv7PrcEVKcmL-0VBnrsmjhVtHgLtdW0A3-uUsxzDREaL6DHi8bP0AyAwVQbgNQJzIwFlUSh_0Npt9yLNjCQr9gnuAUlV3cNR3AwdCncZTlDb8QzjAfZmXf5_d5-OiCSu3yP6BDbyUQu6ezU9lOf_H2I6ZdqpNdwserQwZWAy_qCX480OprYldGh2Qpa8XU3BDT4-j54M%3D) |
---|---|---
Friend,

We’ve got great news!

Governor Holcomb’s campaign just significantly surpassed the number of statewide petition signatures required to earn him a place on the May 2020 ballot. And we’ve done it in rapid time.

_We’ve got great momentum going into 2020. Our campaign is organized, mobilized and energized and we couldn’t have done it without supporters like you._

Thank you for your support in helping us achieve this significant campaign milestone in rapid time. To keep this momentum going, we’re asking Hoosiers from all over the state to endorse Governor Holcomb for 2020.

**[Add your name if you’re ready for four more years of Governor Holcomb Putting People First!](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=f0979bdf6f1948168de09e81da834802&_e=WZVJ8Pakkk6XXwzp91W_O7r3oESp87OlsoPHMF_7rHpDLMBe-Ol3HEH7leKhk9r90SRtz0800aUDX3ABS6s9VArXW7uK7zJZ8XUU6hOG-8Or-1CELD9KeI_LEolPZjV5i7_9EjwbdGDwkayPJ3ZRa4l7sKQhSuvJOgQDrI2oO53HkG0qDVR8E3o3KKs8Mf7axvVBTf7Tfx0YbyftGqAShPfBktUG8itaN0GXNP6EbAsBFrcQKJTlX4kM_rUhQasRJQDMEJoErvrLqXSft8AhldEM058IdaOYyzDSyX4W_V-e0mgP3BGUk9eHTpzZxsD9GaEGBqXokvINFWJO8ZuJtzRttiv_VfFY5EPt4hvgywEKTFrsDauYB9QVgjAjaakb9mgc5W-m2CTGa88CJa35HojCVPbT2Mnrqjg-73cWES8%3D)**

As our governor, Governor Holcomb has been working hard to deliver results for Hoosiers.

**Now it’s time for us to deliver results for Governor Holcomb and show him that we’ve got his back in 2020.**

**[>>Add your name to the growing list of 2020 endorsements for Governor Holcomb now.](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=f0979bdf6f1948168de09e81da834802&_e=WZVJ8Pakkk6XXwzp91W_O7r3oESp87OlsoPHMF_7rHpDLMBe-Ol3HEH7leKhk9r90SRtz0800aUDX3ABS6s9VArXW7uK7zJZ8XUU6hOG-8Or-1CELD9KeI_LEolPZjV5i7_9EjwbdGDwkayPJ3ZRa4l7sKQhSuvJOgQDrI2oO53HkG0qDVR8E3o3KKs8Mf7axvVBTf7Tfx0YbyftGqAShMnTU0QZIaHBEM9tttMkAwK9YFq18Lql7isUW71VaAYF8FNbJ1h0J3jHNdtPTYi4wIFZiy889qGunfH48EVJ3GhU00JTVDtgDZXytqZbHgybU1r7D2ipw5jTuOOx0c6T9t5I-dz79WkMvz5iFF0nGkOD9mZDZzLpQJ2yrtG-pg00Uof-wI533UvBNPMY9U0wx-6-Q3SCUPCurQ013zPJFK8%3D)**
[ **Add your name to the growing list of 2020 endorsements** ](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=f0979bdf6f1948168de09e81da834802&_e=WZVJ8Pakkk6XXwzp91W_O7r3oESp87OlsoPHMF_7rHpDbh8qsnh08iXDLLawQPypGkrDjahQTJTgCOkR6-gpX8iTC1XuG6wM33nndVNbloOiElOrvIVv8fTOfdGHFHCbwCBpJn0V3OJIMYSjM3BfLg0fgMien9zwsYJEay7qg6oXCPAoYEA69EIaZY-7IZU5SGyZNwOsdz1AR9a3KYtD9876sNyT3VLdCMic4NQkCHAYXJY40VvgRjWVFB8rqjoR5QkmB0OUw59D0K3achst6EvEOjEX0oVkysqFJLBBTTTqtfwiYyuK5QoY_pqZ5HQSE9jNhwHBDOYot5aI6V2owaeAIthxIou0dnBSkv-OCXuH5YvOXCIIx8C9y103bw9DQMjzbUDlLyOnZwrL-0QCiS9fn_J2_5q7sEn-H5ZZk_0%3D)

We’ve got great momentum going into 2020. Our campaign is organized, mobilized and energized and we couldn’t have done it without supporters like you. Thank you for your support in helping us achieve this significant campaign milestone in rapid time. To keep this momentum going, we’re asking Hoosiers from all over the state to endorse Governor Holcomb for 2020. As our governor, Governor Holcomb has been working hard to deliver results for Hoosiers. Now it’s time for us to deliver results for Governor Holcomb and show him that we’ve got his back in 2020. Thank you, Holcomb Crew Contributions by corporations and labor organizations are limited to $5,000 annually; contributions by individuals, LLCs and political committees are unlimited. Contributions are not deductible as charitable contributions. Contributions from foreign nationals are prohibited. name: Rob Flaherty, Beto for America
subject: Pocket Change
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BETO FOR AMERICA
body:
[1]Beto for America

Hi,

You’ve heard Beto (and others!) say that Donald Trump isn’t the problem:
he’s the symptom. The problem is that for too long, people have watched as
their incomes have gone down, their planet has cooked, and thousands have
been killed in schools, churches, and Wal-Marts — all while politicians of
both parties have failed to fight for what's obviously right because it's
too hard or too soon.

You don’t beat Donald Trump with half-measures or half of all people. You
beat Donald Trump with a movement that stands proudly, boldly, and loudly
for what’s right — no matter who’s mad. You beat them with a campaign
funded by teachers, parents, and students, giving $5, $10, $15 at a time
(in addition to some time making calls). Pocket change, you might say. But
pocket change that adds up. In fact, if everyone who got this email gave
it $10, we’d have...$10 million. (I’m bad at math but that’s pretty
easy).

Building a campaign on grassroots fundraising isn’t the easiest choice,
but real change doesn't happen when you make decisions based on what's
easy. [ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/38932?refcode=ema20191014-61341&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1019&akid=61341%2E444211%2EfPPSyV ]Let's show them how powerful "pocket change" can be when we all
chip in and fight together. Can you donate $3 to help make
that pocket change add up?

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/38932?refcode=ema20191014-61341&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=61341%2E444211%2EfPPSyV ]Contribute $3

You beat Trump with a campaign driven by deeply held values, that writes
nobody off or takes anyone for granted — no matter how much power you have
or how big or small your donation is.

You know what doesn’t beat Trump? Adjusting the sails when it gets hard.
Changing your positions when the polls dictate it. Relying on and
listening to a small group of elites. It’s time to stop worrying about
what Republicans will say. Let’s just stand up for the right policy, go
out, and defend it.

We might not have the most money in the field — even among those who rely
on grassroots fundraising. But that’s okay. Because if you believe deeply,
speak honestly, and act decisively, you can win. We don’t have the jets or
paid photolines. But we’ve got you. And that’s all we’re going to need.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/38932?refcode=ema20191014-61341&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=61341%2E444211%2EfPPSyV ]Can you donate $3 right now and show everyone what a
campaign looks like when they act on their convictions and values — not
polls or conventional wisdom?

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/38932?refcode=ema20191014-61341&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=61341%2E444211%2EfPPSyV ]Contribute $3

We need you with us, and thanks for everything.

-Rob

Contribute to Beto's campaign: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beto-for-america-emails?refcode=em20191014footer&t=1023&refcode2=61341_444211_fPPSyV&akid=61341%2E444211%2EfPPSyV

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1024&akid=61341%2E444211%2EfPPSyV

PAID FOR BY BETO FOR AMERICA
P.O. Box 3628 El Paso, TX 79923

body:
Last week, Trump's Super PAC announced that six states will make up their top tier targets, and Georgia is on the list. |

[](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa56e/34a064cc/18d82acd/703089e/109413194/VEsH/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://fairfight.com/")

| | | Friend - Last week, Trump's Super PAC announced that six states will make up their top tier targets, and Georgia is on the list along with Ohio, Florida, Pennsylvania, North Carolina, and Michigan. [](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa56e/34a064cc/18d82acd/703089f/109413194/VEsE/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fairfight-2019?refcode=IE101419TRUMP") Every single state on Trump's list is a battleground state where we're already working to ensure Democrats will be prepared with a historic voter protection effort to give voters a fair fight in 2020. Trump's allies realize that Georgia's electorate is changing fast. It's clear that Georgia has the voters to deliver a Democratic victory in 2020. What we need now is the investment to get it done. [**If we're in this fight together, Trump and his allies won't stand a chance. So we 're asking: Will you donate to Fair Fight today?**](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa56e/34a064cc/18d82acd/703089f/109413194/VEsF/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fairfight-2019?refcode=IE101419TRUMP") Our ability to elect leaders who share our values and make progress on the issues we care about depends on our ability to access the ballot. And the truth is that we're not working against Donald Trump or any other Republican, we are working _for_ America. We are working to make good on our country's promise that progress is possible. \- Team Fair Fight

name: Joe Sestak
subject: 26 miles into my walk across New Hampshire
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Joe Sestak for President
body:
*****A REMINDER - I WILL BE LIVE STREAMING MY REAL-TIME DEBATE RESPONSES ON MY [FACEBOOK](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/10870756/109997074/-1339900781?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZmYzZjQ1ZS0yZWVmLWU5MTEtYjVlOS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dT6NRnl_MDgkC3rpjV7fD8WTZn2X6KtNjhJ9DX_a0oc=&emci=cb13a394-e3ee-e911-b5e9-2818784d6d68&emdi=6ff3f45e-2eef-e911-b5e9-2818784d6d68&ceid=250798 "This external link will open in a new window") AND [TWITTER](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/10870757/109997075/-2142313661?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZmYzZjQ1ZS0yZWVmLWU5MTEtYjVlOS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dT6NRnl_MDgkC3rpjV7fD8WTZn2X6KtNjhJ9DX_a0oc=&emci=cb13a394-e3ee-e911-b5e9-2818784d6d68&emdi=6ff3f45e-2eef-e911-b5e9-2818784d6d68&ceid=250798 "This external link will open in a new window") TONIGHT, TUESDAY, OCTOBER 15, AT 8:00 PM EASTERN*****
Yesterday was day 2 of my walk across the Granite State — walking in the shoes of New Hampshirites.
My walk began in the morning from the Civil War soldiers monument in Keene, New Hampshire. Recently, a George Mason University professor wrote that our nation is more divided now than anytime since that Civil War. I believe what is deeply needed today is a candidate who can not just win, but can also unite Americans... **All** Americans.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/10870758/109997076/-622475256?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZmYzZjQ1ZS0yZWVmLWU5MTEtYjVlOS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dT6NRnl_MDgkC3rpjV7fD8WTZn2X6KtNjhJ9DX_a0oc=&emci=cb13a394-e3ee-e911-b5e9-2818784d6d68&emdi=6ff3f45e-2eef-e911-b5e9-2818784d6d68&ceid=250798)
I emphasize all because some Americans are often forgotten, like those who are incarcerated. For years as a Congressman on veterans day I would visit veterans in prison. Along my walk, I was fortunate enough to be invited inside the Cheshire County department of corrections, where I met with veterans and the greater population. Superintendent Van Wickler is doing some tremendous work there creating a progressive prison.
You can watch the WMUR (local ABC affiliate) report about my visit [here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/10870759/109997077/-2067674729?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZmYzZjQ1ZS0yZWVmLWU5MTEtYjVlOS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dT6NRnl_MDgkC3rpjV7fD8WTZn2X6KtNjhJ9DX_a0oc=&emci=cb13a394-e3ee-e911-b5e9-2818784d6d68&emdi=6ff3f45e-2eef-e911-b5e9-2818784d6d68&ceid=250798). WMUR also did a broader piece on my walk across the Granite State ([here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/10870760/109997078/1998227534?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZmYzZjQ1ZS0yZWVmLWU5MTEtYjVlOS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dT6NRnl_MDgkC3rpjV7fD8WTZn2X6KtNjhJ9DX_a0oc=&emci=cb13a394-e3ee-e911-b5e9-2818784d6d68&emdi=6ff3f45e-2eef-e911-b5e9-2818784d6d68&ceid=250798)).
Next, I stopped at the Bitcoin Embassy and a neighboring Mosque on route 101. I followed route 101 into Dublin where I finished my walk for the evening. No slacking - the events for the day were not yet done.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/10870761/109997079/1860177941?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZmYzZjQ1ZS0yZWVmLWU5MTEtYjVlOS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dT6NRnl_MDgkC3rpjV7fD8WTZn2X6KtNjhJ9DX_a0oc=&emci=cb13a394-e3ee-e911-b5e9-2818784d6d68&emdi=6ff3f45e-2eef-e911-b5e9-2818784d6d68&ceid=250798)[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/10870762/109997080/92842853?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZmYzZjQ1ZS0yZWVmLWU5MTEtYjVlOS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dT6NRnl_MDgkC3rpjV7fD8WTZn2X6KtNjhJ9DX_a0oc=&emci=cb13a394-e3ee-e911-b5e9-2818784d6d68&emdi=6ff3f45e-2eef-e911-b5e9-2818784d6d68&ceid=250798)
I hopped into a truck, driven by an organic farmer, and continued my way to a VFW auxiliary meeting to talk with those who have the hardest jobs in America, military spouses. Then, I drove an hour further to Somersworth to speak with local Democrats at the Teatotaller cafe.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/10870763/109997081/-1954957551?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZmYzZjQ1ZS0yZWVmLWU5MTEtYjVlOS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dT6NRnl_MDgkC3rpjV7fD8WTZn2X6KtNjhJ9DX_a0oc=&emci=cb13a394-e3ee-e911-b5e9-2818784d6d68&emdi=6ff3f45e-2eef-e911-b5e9-2818784d6d68&ceid=250798)
I’m now kicking off day 3, where I’ll be traveling from Dublin to Peterborough. Here’s my schedule for the day:
* **Dublin. Walk begins for the day at 6:30am.**
* **Dublin. **_America’s Youth_ at Dublin School, 8am (not open to members of the public).
* **Peterborough. **_Protecting our Seniors_ at Summerhill Assisted Living, 183 Old Dublin Road at 12pm (T).
* **Peterborough. **_Filming "Pints and Politics" _interview at 1pm (not open to members of the public).
* **Peterborough. **_Filming South Carolina Remote Town Hall_ at 2pm (not open to members of the public).
* **Peterborough. **_Live Interview on Fatherhood_ with Actidad at 3:15pm ([link](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/10870764/109997082/1747482134?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZmYzZjQ1ZS0yZWVmLWU5MTEtYjVlOS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dT6NRnl_MDgkC3rpjV7fD8WTZn2X6KtNjhJ9DX_a0oc=&emci=cb13a394-e3ee-e911-b5e9-2818784d6d68&emdi=6ff3f45e-2eef-e911-b5e9-2818784d6d68&ceid=250798))
* **Peterborough. **_Government's Role in Society_ at the Peterborough Public Library at 4pm.
* **Goffstown. **_Town meeting_ organized by local Democrats at Goffstown High School, 27 Wallace Rd at 6:20pm.
* **Windham. **_Town meeting_ organized by local Democrats at Club14, 13 Rockingham Road at 7:30pm.
* **Windham.** _Participation in Democratic Debate _via livestream - more on my [Twitter](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/10870765/109997083/-1746203813?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZmYzZjQ1ZS0yZWVmLWU5MTEtYjVlOS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dT6NRnl_MDgkC3rpjV7fD8WTZn2X6KtNjhJ9DX_a0oc=&emci=c46c7c49-e2ec-e911-b5e9-2818784d6d68&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid=) and [Facebook](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/10870766/109997084/-712015965?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZmYzZjQ1ZS0yZWVmLWU5MTEtYjVlOS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dT6NRnl_MDgkC3rpjV7fD8WTZn2X6KtNjhJ9DX_a0oc=&emci=c46c7c49-e2ec-e911-b5e9-2818784d6d68&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid=). 8:00pm.
* **Peterborough. End of day’s walk.**

clean_body: ***A REMINDER - I WILL BE LIVE STREAMING MY REAL-TIME DEBATE RESPONSES ON MY "This external link will open in a new window" AND "This external link will open in a new window" TONIGHT, TUESDAY, OCTOBER 15, AT 8:00 PM EASTERN* Yesterday was day 2 of my walk across the Granite State — walking in the shoes of New Hampshirites. My walk began in the morning from the Civil War soldiers monument in Keene, New Hampshire. Recently, a George Mason University professor wrote that our nation is more divided now than anytime since that Civil War. I believe what is deeply needed today is a candidate who can not just win, but can also unite Americans... All Americans. I emphasize all because some Americans are often forgotten, like those who are incarcerated. For years as a Congressman on veterans day I would visit veterans in prison. Along my walk, I was fortunate enough to be invited inside the Cheshire County department of corrections, where I met with veterans and the greater population. Superintendent Van Wickler is doing some tremendous work there creating a progressive prison. You can watch the WMUR (local ABC affiliate) report about my visit . WMUR also did a broader piece on my walk across the Granite State (). Next, I stopped at the Bitcoin Embassy and a neighboring Mosque on route 101. I followed route 101 into Dublin where I finished my walk for the evening. No slacking - the events for the day were not yet done. I hopped into a truck, driven by an organic farmer, and continued my way to a VFW auxiliary meeting to talk with those who have the hardest jobs in America, military spouses. Then, I drove an hour further to Somersworth to speak with local Democrats at the Teatotaller cafe. I’m now kicking off day 3, where I’ll be traveling from Dublin to Peterborough. Here’s my schedule for the day: Dublin. Walk begins for the day at 6:30am. Dublin. America’s Youth at Dublin School, 8am (not open to members of the public). Peterborough. Protecting our Seniors at Summerhill Assisted Living, 183 Old Dublin Road at 12pm (T). Peterborough. Filming "Pints and Politics" interview at 1pm (not open to members of the public). Peterborough. Filming South Carolina Remote Town Hall at 2pm (not open to members of the public). Peterborough. Live Interview on Fatherhood with Actidad at 3:15pm () Peterborough. Government's Role in Society at the Peterborough Public Library at 4pm. Goffstown. Town meeting organized by local Democrats at Goffstown High School, 27 Wallace Rd at 6:20pm. Windham. Town meeting organized by local Democrats at Club14, 13 Rockingham Road at 7:30pm. Windham. Participation in Democratic Debate via livestream - more on my = and =. 8:00pm. Peterborough. End of day’s walk. For more information, please check out our events page ( "This external link will open in a new window"). Paid for by Joe Sestak for President. body:
| | [](http://links.mail5.spopessentials5.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjIyNTkxMzMS1&r=NTcyMjY0MzQ5NDY4S0&b=0&j=MTYwMDg4MDM2NAS2&mt=1&rt=0)
---
|
---
| Friends,

I'm excited to share our first Off the Sidelines Spotlight: A snapshot of one of Kirsten's policy priorities with clear ways for you to _engage_ , _elevate_ and _activate_ on the issue.

**Today, we 're spotlighting paid family leave.** Since Kirsten first introduced the FAMILY Act in 2013, this once-marginal issue has entered the mainstream--and we have a real opportunity to make progress on it this year.

Take a look at where we stand today, and how you can amplify Kirsten's efforts to pass **a real paid leave plan**.

Thank you,
Stefanie

Stefanie Conahan
Executive Director, Off the Sidelines

---
| • **The United States is the only industrialized country that does not guarantee some form of paid leave.**
• The 1993 Family and Medical Leave Act gives new moms 12 weeks of unpaid leave, but doesn't apply to the **[40 percent of Americans](http://links.mail5.spopessentials5.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=MjIyNTkxMzMS1&r=NTcyMjY0MzQ5NDY4S0&b=0&j=MTYwMDg4MDM2NAS2&mt=1&rt=0)** working at companies with fewer than 50 employees, or those who have been at their current job for less than one year.
• **Today, just**[**19 percent**](http://links.mail5.spopessentials5.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=MjIyNTkxMzMS1&r=NTcyMjY0MzQ5NDY4S0&b=0&j=MTYwMDg4MDM2NAS2&mt=1&rt=0)** of American workers have access to some kind of paid leave **and only 40 percent have access to short-term disability benefits.
• **The FAMILY Act would change that.** Kirsten's bill transforms paid leave into an earned benefit, affording all workers the ability to take up to three months of paid leave to care for themselves, a new child, or a loved one. **
• Momentum is on our side:** A [new study](http://links.mail5.spopessentials5.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MjIyNTkxMzMS1&r=NTcyMjY0MzQ5NDY4S0&b=0&j=MTYwMDg4MDM2NAS2&mt=1&rt=0) from Data for Progress found that a majority of Americans support a national paid leave program that covers all workers for all of life's caregiving needs.
• The study also found that the FAMILY Act is "the family leave proposal currently introduced in Congress that is most reflective of what working people need and...sets the standard for the 2020 Presidential field."

---
| **• WATCH** | Last week, Kirsten sat down with MSNBC anchor Katy Tur (who herself issued a [powerful call](http://links.mail5.spopessentials5.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjIyNTkxMzMS1&r=NTcyMjY0MzQ5NDY4S0&b=0&j=MTYwMDg4MDM2NAS2&mt=1&rt=0) to Congress to pass paid leave days after returning from maternity leave) to [discuss the FAMILY Act](http://links.mail5.spopessentials5.com/ctt?kn=11&ms=MjIyNTkxMzMS1&r=NTcyMjY0MzQ5NDY4S0&b=0&j=MTYwMDg4MDM2NAS2&mt=1&rt=0)
• **READ** | The full [Data for Progress study](http://links.mail5.spopessentials5.com/ctt?kn=12&ms=MjIyNTkxMzMS1&r=NTcyMjY0MzQ5NDY4S0&b=0&j=MTYwMDg4MDM2NAS2&mt=1&rt=0)

---
| Presidential candidates, members of Congress, and states around the country are following Kirsten's lead and supporting and passing paid family and medical leave programs, helping millions of American families.

Unfortunately, there are a number of bad proposals out there that would harm those who need our help the most, including women, low-wage workers and communities of color.

**Tell your member of Congress that you want _real_ paid leave now--a plan that is:**
* Gender-neutral;
* Family-friendly, covering new babies, sick parents, injured spouses, or your own personal medical emergencies;
* Accessible for all workers, who own their benefit;
* And affordable for all workers to take.

---
| | If women made up 50% of Congress, there's no way we would still be debating paid family leave. We can change that.

[**Donate to Off the Sidelines today to elect women candidates up and down the ballot in 2020.**](http://links.mail5.spopessentials5.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MjIyNTkxMzMS1&r=NTcyMjY0MzQ5NDY4S0&b=0&j=MTYwMDg4MDM2NAS2&mt=1&rt=0)
---
|
---
| Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
---
| _Contributions or gifts to Off the Sidelines PAC are not tax-deductible. Off the Sidelines PAC does not accept contributions from federal lobbyists, corporate and/or trade association PACs, or "for profit" business entities, including but not limited to sole proprietorships, partnerships, and LLCs._

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We'd hate to see you go, but if you want to stop receiving messages from Kirsten altogether, [click here to unsubscribe](https://www.pages05.net/gfppcinc/unsubscribe/Unsubscribe?spMailingID=22259133&spUserID=NTcyMjY0MzQ5NDY4S0&spJobID=MTYwMDg4MDM2NAS2&spReportId=MTYwMDg4MDM2NAS2).
---

name: Eric
subject: it's a lot to withstand
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beshear/Coleman 2019
body:
We've been outspent in a big way. Matt Bevin is a self-funder who can dump in millions of his personal fortune whenever he wants.
|
---

| | Peter,

We've been outspent in a big way. Matt Bevin is a self-funder who can dump in _millions of his personal fortune_ whenever he wants. Just before the last major reporting deadline earlier this month, he gave himself $900,000: | [](https://action.andybeshear.com/page/m/525579e9/ad6dc73/1464f179/db7c5ea/409040744/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjM1OCJ9/?g=8QZoJjpTVzRcx_d4IN6n_jA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beshear-outspent?refcode=20191015.1nd__358__&amount=5")
---
On top of his own fortune, he has a lot of out-of-state dark money backers who have poured huge amounts of money into this race.

But despite all this big money behind Bevin, **Andy continues to lead.** This race is rated as a "toss-up" by national prognosticators. We're considered the number one pick-up opportunity for Democrats this election cycle, and Matt Bevin is the most unpopular governor in the entire country.

**We just need to make sure that we have the resources we need in this final stretch. Will you donate now?**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
**[DONATE $5](https://action.andybeshear.com/page/m/525579e9/ad6dc73/1464f179/db7c5eb/409040744/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjM1OCJ9/?g=8QZoJjpTVzRcx_d4IN6n_jA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beshear-outspent?express_lane=true&refcode=20191015.1nd__358__&amount=5")**
**[DONATE $10](https://action.andybeshear.com/page/m/525579e9/ad6dc73/1464f179/db7c5e8/409040744/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjM1OCJ9/?g=8QZoJjpTVzRcx_d4IN6n_jA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beshear-outspent?express_lane=true&refcode=20191015.1nd__358__&amount=10")**
**[DONATE $25](https://action.andybeshear.com/page/m/525579e9/ad6dc73/1464f179/db7c5e9/409040744/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjM1OCJ9/?g=8QZoJjpTVzRcx_d4IN6n_jA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beshear-outspent?express_lane=true&refcode=20191015.1nd__358__&amount=25")**
**[DONATE $50](https://action.andybeshear.com/page/m/525579e9/ad6dc73/1464f179/db7c5ee/409040744/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjM1OCJ9/?g=8QZoJjpTVzRcx_d4IN6n_jA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beshear-outspent?express_lane=true&refcode=20191015.1nd__358__&amount=50")**
**[DONATE $100](https://action.andybeshear.com/page/m/525579e9/ad6dc73/1464f179/db7c5ef/409040744/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjM1OCJ9/?g=8QZoJjpTVzRcx_d4IN6n_jA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beshear-outspent?express_lane=true&refcode=20191015.1nd__358__&amount=100")**
**[CHOOSE AN AMOUNT](https://action.andybeshear.com/page/m/525579e9/ad6dc73/1464f179/db7c5ec/409040744/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjM1OCJ9/?g=8QZoJjpTVzRcx_d4IN6n_jA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beshear-outspent?refcode=20191015.1nd__358__")**
We've always known this would be hard, but the stakes are too high not to give it everything we have. Matt Bevin has tried to strip health care away from thousands of Kentuckians, attacked public education and tried to illegally cut the pensions of teachers, social workers and first responders. We need to win this race.

We've had millions spent against Andy. It's a lot to withstand, but because of our grassroots supporters, we're putting up a strong fight. **[Join us and chip in right now.](https://action.andybeshear.com/page/m/525579e9/ad6dc73/1464f179/db7c5ea/409040744/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjM1OCJ9/?g=8QZoJjpTVzRcx_d4IN6n_jA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beshear-outspent?refcode=20191015.1nd__358__&amount=5")**

Thanks for all you do,
Eric Hyers, Campaign Manager

Some people considered this campaign a long shot, but the strength of this grassroots movement continues to prove them all wrong.

name: Team Franken
subject: The first impeachment ad:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Franken for Iowa
body:
We're the first campaign in the country to run a TV ad about impeachment. This is a serious matter and we need your help to keep our message on the air. Chip in today
|
---

| | _**WATCH: We 're the first campaign to run a TV ad about impeachment.
[Pitch in $25 to help keep it on the air.](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f2475/33365068/4a651db3/3f8bb9ba/1735102658/VEsH/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/franken-impeachment-tvad?refcode=20191015_em_fr_topper&amount=25")**_
* * *
Friends - When Republican Senator Barry Goldwater urged President Nixon to resign, he called on Republicans to follow their conscience. Joni Ernst isn't doing that. She is incapable of answering the simple question of whether it's appropriate for the president to ask foreign governments to interfere in American elections. Saying that we're going to have to wait and see what happens, isn't good enough when a basic precept of democracy is on the line. We need to let Iowans know that as a retired Navy admiral, Mike will stand up for you. That's why he was the first Democrat in this race to announce his support for the impeachment inquiry. "Let the process follow its course," he says. And, it's why we're the first campaign in the nation to air a TV ad on this crucial issue. That's the kind of leadership we need in the senate. Mike Franken made a career of protecting our democracy and our national security. [**WATCH our ad, and if you can, please donate $ to make sure we keep it on the air...so Iowans know he 's our next senator.**](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f2475/33365068/4a651db3/3f8bb9bb/1735102658/VEsE/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/franken-impeachment-tvad?refcode=20191015_em_fr&amount=25") | [Keep Our Ad on the Air](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f2475/33365068/4a651db3/3f8bb9b4/1735102658/VEsF/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/franken-impeachment-tvad?refcode=20191015_em_fr_button")
---
Friends, let's be clear: Joni Ernst isn't doing her job as senator. Her lack of leadership and inaction is violating her commitment to our constitution. She's a military officer, and she knows better.
Let's do this together,
Team Franken
|
---

| | Paid for by Franken for Iowa
---
Michael Franken was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

Franken for Iowa
PO Box 3171
Sioux City, IA 51102

"Let the process follow its course," he says. And, it's why we're the first campaign in the nation to air a TV ad on this crucial issue. That's the kind of leadership we need in the senate. Mike Franken made a career of protecting our democracy and our national security. "" | "" Friends, let's be clear: Joni Ernst isn't doing her job as senator. Her lack of leadership and inaction is violating her commitment to our constitution. She's a military officer, and she knows better. Let's do this together, Team Franken | | | Paid for by Franken for Iowa Michael Franken was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense. Franken for Iowa PO Box 3171 Sioux City, IA 51102

name: Bobby Jindal
subject: New article: "Trump Wins Every Democratic Debate"
body:
When 60% of Democrats want a nominee more liberal than Obama, you know our nation is on a dangerous path
Everyone,
In case you missed it, I published a new article in the Wall Street Journal discussing the effect of the Democratic presidential debates.

[https://www.wsj.com/articles/trump-wins-every-democratic-debate-11570995979](http://mail.americanxt.com/u/click?_t=45ea7b9dcedb45198104e7ca02a78270&_m=101ee22db53d4f9c985b230b93172445&_e=Di5Y2AOj2erfWSZQ21XE7YTWs06mV-dkb1q9ZCkjOP_Ez0NZZwZx1X-StT9K6eb6xFVgZfftyM_y2n5egRxR6rqq2PvTLrRG7_kDtEjXPo-4nleN7iNUSQUVpDaSmowdj3uO4hFihWc80AZ509LAxIze-_ZRvkOZ22xAbIUEJTdlsd0om3EM_1tpAKddvR82u4n-cTlQPIhaf6flB6HjOqb28qSAMDAqJGwjnH9w8lE_DkADDUzo4Fe0a6TGou3AnHc1NVfsPNKb5LFAfhTEyw70p5DCyykR8Nhisxn7GSV5nn_sU8s8wlHV1xH7bnAjIDUQ-U17Tm0m5_w9vCmeskA6lU6JfbjQnycUCbwjoI6S2uIsKypaWkjkQHC87-GXAAUWF8eXqck2a--PkEqlgBuSnc54jtJ9kKVDlJkTFXg%3D)

The Republican National Committee should offer to be the official sponsor of a weekly Democratic presidential debate. There would be no better advertisement for President Trump’s re-election. Sure, there are funny moments, there are substantive moments. As a whole, the debates would be yet another entertaining piece of television for our nation, if the ideas they were discussing weren’t so dangerous.

Their radical ideas range from completely open borders to a blanket confiscation of guns to adding trillions of dollars to our government spending. In regard to healthcare, they’re stretching Obama’s lie of “you can keep your healthcare plan” even further with their promises of Medicare for All.

When 60% of Democrats want a nominee more liberal than Obama, you know our nation is on a dangerous path. Voters who aren't necessarily fond of Trump will nonetheless feel compelled to vote for him over the radical alternative. The farther the Democratic debates stray to the left, the more President Trump should hope the nation is watching.

Sincerely,

Bobby Jindal

If you would like to be removed from this email list, [please use this link](http://mail.americanxt.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=45ea7b9dcedb45198104e7ca02a78270&_s=101ee22db53d4f9c985b230b93172445&_t=sDNrFH48YX-ojACyMp76nKunrPvnudeaib6--bS143i7_PatkTOvM3zfFJaa7vzErFNWUnvkgFb_wxH-aM1wR0dfdQEARReRZ9kHbYPmv4BDCbMt_XqAJ47dPylhWp3tWxvMj4lyL-4ucdMJyBKrmKX6kFiKG_U9Ogq1e-hDNB4%3D).

| | Hi Peter, We've learned even more about the rampant corruption in Trump's administration. Here's the summary on Washington's most corrupt power couple, Elaine Chao and Mitch McConnell: **Who:** Secretary of Transportation Elaine Chao (Mitch McConnell's wife) **Where:** Washington, D.C. and Kentucky \-- Mitch McConnell's home state **What:** Under investigation for using her position to get lucrative business opportunities and loans for members of her family, allegedly totalling in the hundreds of millions of dollars. She also appointed a special liaison to help with grant applications that benefit Kentucky, resulting in at least $78 million being spent there ahead of her husband's impending re-election bid. **What 's NEW:** Elaine spent a quarter of her meetings as Secretary of Transportation meeting with Kentucky officials to discuss fast-laning federal grants to them, with McConnell staffers specifically requesting many of these meetings (sounds like blatant corruption to us). **Why:** To help her family hoard wealth and win her husband his Senate seat **What you can do:** We're asking voters what they think about this new development, and we need 105 more responses by MIDNIGHT: **Do you approve of Mitch McConnell and Elaine Chao?** [YES](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdd98/6e9863e8/15918119/1db0fed0/1789605920/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/QknKMD4P") [NO](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdd98/6e9863e8/15918119/1db0fed0/1789605920/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/QknKMD4P") Thanks for your support, WDTO Team [DONATE](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdd98/6e9863e8/15918119/1db0fed7/1789605920/VEsF/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcgrathvmitch-nd?refcode=OUT20191015a.ND-b&refcode2=6FFwhgcUJ1XqlsYpFEgq")

subject: Show Beto he has supporters EVERYWHERE (even in 34223!)

body:
[1]Beto for America

Do you
remember this?

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/17006?refcode=ema20191015-61472&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=61472%2E444211%2E9hvrPt ]Beto on Guns

At the last debate, Beto did what he does best: He spoke his mind — even
if it wasn’t the most “popular” thing to say, even if he’d become the
target of the gun lobby and its allies — because Americans deserve more
than a leader that “plays it safe.”

Beto will be back on the debate stage tonight and we can’t wait to see him
lead the conversation again on the issues we care about most.

We want to prove to Beto in a big way that we have his back before he
walks on stage. [ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/17006?refcode=ema20191015-61472&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=61472%2E444211%2E9hvrPt ]Will you chip in $3 so we can show Beto
that he has supporters from all over the country tonight (even
34223 is cheering him on!)?

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/17006?refcode=ema20191015-61472&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=61472%2E444211%2E9hvrPt ]Contribute $3

Here's the truth.

Since the last debate, we’ve made some pretty powerful enemies. Beto
showed courage and honesty — and that terrifies people like Trump. That’s
why since then Trump, the NRA, and all of their Republican friends have
been attacking our campaign and smearing Beto’s policies.

But here’s why we’re not worried: There’s more of us than them. Our
grassroots army knows how to fight –– we’ve seen you do it before, and
we’re confident with you on our side that we can keep defying the odds.

Let’s show our strength before Beto walks onto the debate stage tonight.
[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/17006?refcode=ema20191015-61472&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=61472%2E444211%2E9hvrPt ]Please chip in $3 or anything you can and let Beto know
he has folks rooting for him from 34223 and beyond tonight.

- Team Beto

Contribute to Beto's campaign: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beto-for-america-emails?refcode=em20191015footer&t=1023&refcode2=61472_444211_9hvrPt&akid=61472%2E444211%2E9hvrPt

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1024&akid=61472%2E444211%2E9hvrPt

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: What Are the Democrats Hiding About Impeachment Inquiry?
body:
"America’s top two Trump-hating newspapers, The New York Times and The Washington Post, have now both called on Speaker Nancy Pelosi to..." | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=b6b1fe04ad&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **What Are the Democrats Hiding About Impeachment Inquiry?**

“America’s top two Trump-hating newspapers, The New York Times and The Washington Post, have now both called on Speaker Nancy Pelosi to hold a vote of the full House of Representatives to make the ‘impeachment inquiry’ truly official — and to set rules like those for the inquiries targeting Presidents Richard Nixon and Bill Clinton, so that the minority party and the White House weren’t totally sidelined,” the _New York Post_ editorial board writes.

“So far, though, Pelosi and her impeachment pointman, Rep. Adam Schiff, are moving the opposite way,” holding closed door hearings and even suggesting that the “whistleblower” whose account launched this entire probe may not need to testify at all.

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=d9352f800f&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “There is no doubt the 25-year-old [NAFTA] agreement is past its prime. It is increasingly hurting Alaskan businesses with lax enforcement of illegal, unreported and unregulated fishing; failure to police fishing subsidies; and outdated intellectual property and digital trade rules,” Gov. Mike Dunleavy (R-AK) writes for [**Fox News**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=4b26d568d8&e=3ee4985eea). “Unfortunately, [USMCA’s] commonsense measures are being blocked by House Speaker Nancy Pelosi.”
---
|
---
| “Udacity, the online education company founded by Sebastian Thrun, is launching a new scholarship initiative as part of the Pledge to America’s Workers job training initiative undertaken by the administration of President Donald Trump,” Jonathan Shieber reports for [_TechCrunch_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=22bb6ec8dc&e=3ee4985eea). “Udacity is committing to giving away free introductory technology training classes to 20,000 applicants every year.”
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=d40554b561&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=9a330c1d7e&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=879a141695)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

body:
Cory Gardner made headlines last week for refusing (five times) to answer a simple yes-or-no question about whether it's wrong for a president to ask a foreign government to meddle in our elections. | | | [](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/637714b6/691c9bd/6fc13a6f/11a79df6/2403711543/VEsH/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-oct?refcode=em_template")
---
| Team,

Cory Gardner made headlines last week for refusing (five times) to answer a simple yes-or-no question about whether it's wrong for a president to ask a foreign government to meddle in our elections.

**That isn 't an accident. Stonewalling is their strategy.** They know that the right answer to that question will anger the current occupant of the White House--so they dodge, and hedge, and blame the people asking the questions.

Right now, they're hoping they can stall long enough for voters and the media to move on. They're counting on us to forget all about it. **Our campaign is going to do everything in its power to make sure they don 't get away with it and Donald Trump is held accountable.**

Our message is simple: If you want to be a U.S. Senator from Colorado, you need to answer questions from the people of Colorado. [**_Chip in today and help Team Hickenlooper keep the pressure on Cory Gardner so he can 't squirm his way out of answering the questions that matter._**](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-oct?refcode=em_fr_20191015_MES_20191015-fr-MES-stonewalling-all_all_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=")

We started October with a sizeable fundraising gap with the Gardner campaign. They had a huge head start, but we believe we can close that gap in the months ahead. We're just $21,400 away from staying on target and reaching our mid-month goal.

Because we don't take a dime from corporate PACs, the only way to catch up with opponents who enjoy their support is with help from people like you.

Over the last few days we've gotten a good look at what's at stake in this race--and the lengths the other side will go to hold on to this seat.

It's going to take all of us to fight back. [**_Chip in what you can today._**](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-oct?refcode=em_fr_20191015_MES_20191015-fr-MES-stonewalling-all_all_l2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=")

Thank you,

M.E. Smith
Campaign Manager
Team Hick [](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-oct?refcode=em_fr_20191015_MES_20191015-fr-MES-stonewalling-all_all_contribbutton&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=")
---
| | Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado
---

P.O. Box 18886, Denver, CO 80218
Contributions or gifts to Hickenlooper for Colorado are not tax deductible.
If you got this message from a friend, you can join the Hickenlooper for Colorado team by **[_signing up right here_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/637714b6/691c9bd/6fc13a6f/11a79df2/2403711543/VEsD/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/s/sign-up?source=em_footer")**.
Keep us company on the campaign trail by joining us on [_**Facebook**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/637714b6/691c9bd/6fc13a6f/11a79df3/2403711543/VEsA/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://www.facebook.com/JohnHickenlooper/"), [_**Twitter**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/637714b6/691c9bd/6fc13a6f/11a79df0/2403711543/VEsB/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://twitter.com/hickenlooper"), [_**Instagram**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/637714b6/691c9bd/6fc13a6f/11a79df1/2403711543/VEsO/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://www.instagram.com/johnhickenlooper/"), and [_**YouTube**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/637714b6/691c9bd/6fc13a6f/11a79dee/2403711543/VEsP/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC82O0Byp_ny13O0LkO1UpUg/featured").
We love staying connected to you--and these emails are the best way to stay up to date with the latest on this campaign. But if at any point you'd like to stop receiving these messages, you can unsubscribe [here](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/637714b6/691c9bd/6fc13a6f/11a79def/2403711543/VEsHBQ/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com").
If we're not reaching you at the correct email address, please update your information [_**here**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/637714b6/691c9bd/6fc13a6f/11a79df2/2403711543/VEsHBA/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/s/sign-up?source=em_footer").

subject: BIG NEWS!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hattersley for Congress
body:
NEW: Adam Hattersley’s Q3 fundraising outpaces Ross Spano!
Help Adam keep up the momentum ➜ Act Blue
[http://secure.actblue.com/donate/hattersley_q42019?refcode=Em_fr_2019.10.15_b1_EB_all&amount=21.00&recurring=1]
----

Hi Peter,

Today, last quarter’s FEC fundraising reports were made public, and for the first time since we launched our campaign, we know exactly what we’re up against.

In our first quarter of the cycle, our daily fundraising outpaced incumbent Ross Spano with our entirely grassroots-fueled campaign!

Help us keep up the momentum to put scandal-ridden Spano on notice!
Suggested Donation: $21 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hattersley_q42019refcode=Em_fr_2019.10.15_b1_EB_all&amount=21.00&recurring=1]

Ross Spano’s shady campaign dealings are finally starting to catch up with him, and so is Adam’s campaign to unseat him and give Floridians leadership they can be proud of.

Help us make the most of this news by donating now >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/hattersley_q42019?refcode=Em_fr_2019.10.15_b1_EB_all&amount=21.00&recurring=1]

-Erica

Adam Hattersley is Navy Veteran and local state representative working to flip Florida's 15th Congressional District.
Can we count on you to contribute a few dollars to Adam's campaign? >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hattersley_q42019?refcode=Em_fr_2019.10.15_b1_EB_all&amount=21.00&recurring=1]

name: Trent Bolger
subject: FWD: We have a match!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by A whole lot of folks for Wilmot Collins, PO Box 458, Helena, MT 59624
body:
We only need 8 more people
Hey!
This is so exciting:
Yesterday, Maddie sent out an email saying a generous donor was going to MATCH every contribution for Wilmot's birthday.
With only 4 hours left until we give Wilmot the big surprise, 92 people have already made a matched donation!
_If we can tell Wilmot over 100 people chipped into his birthday match_ , he'll be smiling from ear to ear.
**So what do you say, friend? Will you be one of the last 8 people we need to get us there?**
**[https://act.wilmotcollins.com/Happy-Birthday-Wilmot](https://act.wilmotcollins.com/page/m/56164656/1e3760f0/691710f3/5f7edeed/1163232303/VEsH/?g=ENsuPVNw52hc6i6rfY8XtkA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/1910-hbd-wilmot?refcode=191015-email&recurring=auto")**
Trent Bolger
Campaign Manager
Wilmot for Senate
\------- Original Message -------

Friend,
Maddie Collins here, Wilmot's wife. I'm emailing you with some special news! It's Wilmot's birthday tomorrow, and I thought of a great way to surprise him.
**[A generous donor offered to MATCH whatever we raise today ONLY to celebrate Wilmot's birthday.](https://act.wilmotcollins.com/page/m/56164656/1e3760f0/691710f3/5f7edeed/1163232303/VEsE/?g=ENsuPVNw52hc6i6rfY8XtkA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/1910-hbd-wilmot?refcode=191015-email&recurring=auto")**
Will you help us raise as much as we can over the next 24 hours to give Wilmot this amazing gift?
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
[$5](https://act.wilmotcollins.com/page/m/56164656/1e3760f0/691710f3/5f7edeea/1163232303/VEsF/?g=ENsuPVNw52hc6i6rfY8XtkA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/1910-hbd-wilmot?refcode=191015-email&recurring=true&express_lane=true&amount=5") | [$20](https://act.wilmotcollins.com/page/m/56164656/1e3760f0/691710f3/5f7edeeb/1163232303/VEsC/?g=ENsuPVNw52hc6i6rfY8XtkA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/1910-hbd-wilmot?refcode=191015-email&recurring=true&express_lane=true&amount=20") | [$50](https://act.wilmotcollins.com/page/m/56164656/1e3760f0/691710f3/5f7edee8/1163232303/VEsD/?g=ENsuPVNw52hc6i6rfY8XtkA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/1910-hbd-wilmot?refcode=191015-email&recurring=true&express_lane=true&amount=50")
---|---|---
[$100](https://act.wilmotcollins.com/page/m/56164656/1e3760f0/691710f3/5f7edee9/1163232303/VEsA/?g=ENsuPVNw52hc6i6rfY8XtkA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/1910-hbd-wilmot?refcode=191015-email&recurring=true&express_lane=true&amount=100") | [$250](https://act.wilmotcollins.com/page/m/56164656/1e3760f0/691710f3/5f7edee6/1163232303/VEsB/?g=ENsuPVNw52hc6i6rfY8XtkA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/1910-hbd-wilmot?refcode=191015-email&recurring=true&express_lane=true&amount=250") | [Other](https://act.wilmotcollins.com/page/m/56164656/1e3760f0/691710f3/5f7edee7/1163232303/VEsO/?g=ENsuPVNw52hc6i6rfY8XtkA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/1910-hbd-wilmot?refcode=191015-email&recurring=true&express_lane=true")

[](https://act.wilmotcollins.com/page/m/56164656/1e3760f0/691710f3/5f7edeed/1163232303/VEsP/?g=ENsuPVNw52hc6i6rfY8XtkA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/1910-hbd-wilmot?refcode=191015-email&recurring=auto")
Wilmot and I are so grateful for the outpouring of support you've already shown for our campaign. However, in order to spread our message that Wilmot will fight to preserve our planet, fight for better healthcare and expand economic opportunity for all, _**_we need to go all-in on this rare and generous opportunity._**_
I've seen first-hand how hard Wilmot fights for our family and our community, so I know he'll put that fire and that grit to work for _ALL_ Montanans.
I'll be blunt - we need your help to flip this Senate seat, friend.
**[So, please, consider giving $10, $20 or even $50 toward this amazing match opportunity.](https://act.wilmotcollins.com/page/m/56164656/1e3760f0/691710f3/5f7edee4/1163232303/VEsHBQ/?g=ENsuPVNw52hc6i6rfY8XtkA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/1910-hbd-wilmot?refcode=191015-email&recurring=auto&amount=20")**
So grateful for your support,

Maddie Collins

* * *
Paid for by A whole lot of folks for Wilmot Collins, PO Box 458, Helena, MT 59624
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Supporters like you are a crucial part of our team, but if you'd like to unsubscribe, you can [click here](https://act.wilmotcollins.com/page/m/56164656/1e3760f0/691710f3/5f7edee5/1163232303/VEsHBA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=ENsuPVNw52hc6i6rfY8XtkA "https://wilmotcollins.cp.bsd.net/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). name: Tim Ryan
subject: Time-sensitive
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for America
body:
|
---
Folks --

Yesterday, I drove myself to stand with the brave union workers on the UAW picket lines across Ohio and Michigan.

This strike -- and the teachers' strikes that inspired it -- shows that we are at a pivotal moment in America's history. With the Presidential debate taking place here in my home state of Ohio tonight, we have a real chance to make sure _our_ voices are heard. Our message is clear: **we must never stop fighting for America 's working families.**

I am asking for your help to deliver a powerful message to my friends and colleagues who will be on the debate stage tonight: It is _essential_ for Democrats to stand up for workers -- from the UAW members on strike to the fast food workers fighting for $15 and a union -- and we can't ever forget it.

[**That 's why we need your help. Show your support as we collect as many signatures as possible to say "I will fight for American workers" and ensure that every Democratic candidate speaks about what they would do for working families.**](https://secure.timryanforamerica.%3D/?g=i0wvQ1H8x8Va89sNxWeKKQ "https://secure.timryanforamerica.com/page/s/support-american-workers?firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=1+-+Thatrsquos+why+we+need+your+help+Show+yo&utm_campaign=TR_EM_PT_30DO_191015_1_1&source=TR_EM_PT_30DO_191015_1_1&refcode=TR_EM_PT_30DO_191015_1_1")

I am in this race for everyday Americans, so they will know they haven't been forgotten -- not by me and not by the Democratic Party. Since I can't be on the debate stage, I want to make sure that everyone who's up there is making damn sure they are speaking for all of us.

[**Add your name. Tell the Democratic candidates on the debate stage to speak up for American workers.**](https://secure.timryanforamerica.%3D/?g=i0wvQ1H8x8Va89sNxWeKKQ "https://secure.timryanforamerica.com/page/s/support-american-workers?firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=2+-+Add+your+name+Tell+the+Democratic+candid&utm_campaign=TR_EM_PT_30DO_191015_1_1&source=TR_EM_PT_30DO_191015_1_1&refcode=TR_EM_PT_30DO_191015_1_1")

Join me in this important fight and make sure our message is clear.

In solidarity,
Tim
|
---
Paid for by Tim Ryan for America
Contribute now to help Tim take his vision for our future across the United States! [**Donate now.**](https://secure.timryanforamerica.com/page/m/d7a9a3b/5486deaa/3e166234/dc8436e/923675457/VEsF/?g=i0wvQ1H8x8Va89sNxWeKKQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tr-emfooter?amount=5&utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=3+-+Donate+now&utm_campaign=TR_EM_PT_30DO_191015_1_1&source=TR_EM_PT_30DO_191015_1_1&refcode=TR_EM_PT_30DO_191015_1_1")

**We know email can be overwhelming,**
so if you'd like to receive only the most important updates, you can join our email-lite list [here](https://secure.timryanforamerica.com/page/m/d7a9a3b/5486deaa/3e166234/dc84311/923675457/VEsC/?g=i0wvQ1H8x8Va89sNxWeKKQ "https://timryan.cp.bsd.net/page/s/receive-fewer-emails?utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=4+-+here&utm_campaign=TR_EM_PT_30DO_191015_1_1&source=TR_EM_PT_30DO_191015_1_1&refcode=TR_EM_PT_30DO_191015_1_1"), or unsubscribe from all email by [ clicking here.](https://secure.timryanforamerica.com/page/m/d7a9a3b/5486deaa/3e166234/dc84310/923675457/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZQUWtaVlUwTkJWRVZFVWtWRFNWQkpSVTVVU1VRbEpRPT0iOiIzZTE2NjIzNCIsIkpTVlBRa1pWVTBOQlZFVkVUVUZKVEVsT1IxTkZUa1JKUkNVbCI6ImQ3YTlhM2IifQ%3D%3D/?g=i0wvQ1H8x8Va89sNxWeKKQ "https://secure.timryanforamerica.com/page/oneclickunsubscribe/3e166234/d7a9a3b?utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=5+-++clicking+here&utm_campaign=TR_EM_PT_30DO_191015_1_1&source=TR_EM_PT_30DO_191015_1_1&refcode=TR_EM_PT_30DO_191015_1_1")

name: Jason Yates
subject: Tune in to celebrate the Dove Awards with My Faith Votes
body:
| | We’ll be there - you won’t want to miss this special event.
---

| Peter, Did you know that for [50 years the GMA Dove Awards](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=h_pmCxCO2c7H1rOkQ8qGGjVoOZARCXaMc-xORpXBZ0Y&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e191015com01&n=2) has been celebrating and honoring outstanding achievements and excellence in Christian Music? That’s a long time! And this year, My Faith Votes is privileged to be the media sponsor for the awards event. We will be encouraging the artists, and Christians who tune in to watch from across the nation, to **_Do Good and Go Vote!_** **The show will be aired exclusively on TBN October 20 at 8 PM ET / 5 PM PT.** Artist nominations include Lauren Daigle, for KING & COUNTRY, Kirk Franklin, Phil Wickham, TobyMac, Crowder, Tasha Cobbs, Matthew West and many more! We hope you will plan to watch this special Gospel Music Awards event on TBN and be sure to look for My Faith Votes as we encourage Christians to seize every opportunity to do good, as Galatians 6:10 says. **Pray with us that through this event, millions of Christians would be reminded to pray faithfully for our leaders and our nation, think biblically about the issues, and commit to vote in every election!** It’s going to be a great night of Christian music, celebrating the theme of “endless hallelujah.” We hope you’ll mark this special event on your calendar and join us by tuning in to TBN! Don’t have cable? [You can watch the Livestream on our Facebook page](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6sQ5cX_bEu8cPkWYJ2Mr5-wZKXu3dY5XWtaPM4h3adih&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e191015com01&n=3). **United. We Stand.** Jason Yates
CEO
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e191015com01&n=4)

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: Children's healthcare should be a priority not a political pawn
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|

| | Hello Peter, The Children's Health Insurance Program helps states provide health insurance to families with children, extending much-needed coverage to 8.9 million children in America. body:
Peter, we're exactly THREE weeks out from Election Day, and I'm about to hit the road to head to Lexington for our second televised debate against Matt Bevin.
|

| | Peter, we're exactly THREE weeks out from Election Day, and I'm about to hit the road to head to Lexington for our second televised debate against Matt Bevin.

On tonight's debate stage, you're going to see a stark contrast. I will be a governor who listens more than he talks. I'm not just running to _be_ governor but to govern well.

**But we can 't restore decency to the governor's office without you -- so I'm asking for you to show strong grassroots support for this campaign by chipping in before tonight's debate.** _If you've "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beshear-debate2?refcode=20191015.2nd__360__")** Matt Bevin is going to try to distort his record: be ready to hear about jobs he's announced but haven't actually been created -- or jobs that rely on huge tax incentives for out-of-state CEOs but that pay cut-rate wages that can't support a family.

He's going to say -- with a straight face -- that Kentuckians were never discriminated against on the basis of pre-existing conditions when we all know that isn't true. He's trying to return us to the days when big insurance companies had all the power.

He's going to claim that he never bullied teachers when he's right there on video doing so and that he supports education while proposing huge cuts to our public schools.

It's time to hold him accountable. Will you join me?

**[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beshear-debate2](https://action.andybeshear.com/page/m/525579ec/ad6dc73/1465a464/db7faa4/2584203135/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjM2MCJ9/?g=8QZoJjpTVzRcx_d4IN6n_jA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beshear-debate2?refcode=20191015.2nd__360__&amount=5")**

I appreciate all of your support. Thank you,
Andy Beshear | | **[DONATE](https://action.andybeshear.com/page/m/525579ec/ad6dc73/1465a464/db7faa4/2584203135/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjM2MCJ9/?g=8QZoJjpTVzRcx_d4IN6n_jA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beshear-debate2?refcode=20191015.2nd__360__&amount=5")**

body:

| | **BREAKING: TRUMP 'REFUSES TO COOPERATE' WITH INVESTIGATION** **[10,000 IMMEDIATE SIGNATURES NEEDED: Sign my emergency petition if you agree Trump is NOT above the law >>](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b475/18e32a7f/535caa04/7b15ecdc/3291434228/VEsH/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/trump-investigation-survey?source=20191015_em_pet_b1_iiv_all_v1")** | I have never seen anything so dangerous.

name: Tina Smith
subject: [TAKE ACTION]: Stop Robocalls! 📵
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
We all have received these robocalls, but now it's time for Congress to get legislation across the finish line. Add your name to stop the scam calls >>

| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-oct2019?refcode=em191015robocalls-full&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=") Team -

The phones are ringing nonstop.

For some, the number of robocalls we get every day, even every hour, is a nuisance. But for others, it's the start of being involved with a scam.

This isn't in question: We need to be doing more to stop these calls.

Both the Senate and the House have passed legislation to stop these harassing calls, and now we need to get legislation across the finish line. **I want these calls to stop as much as you do, and I need your help to make that happen.**

**[Friend, I'm counting on you to be one of the voices we need urging Congress to crack down on robocalls. Add your name right now>>](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc41a91/c1f7015/670f3ce1/1145f0a5/871614550/VEsE/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://www.signherenow.org/petition/stop-scam-robocalls/smith?refcode=em191015robocalls-full&&")** **[ADD YOUR NAME](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc41a91/c1f7015/670f3ce1/1145f0a6/871614550/VEsF/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://www.signherenow.org/petition/stop-scam-robocalls/smith?refcode=em191015robocalls-full&")** If Congress can get legislation across the finish line, we can shed light on who these callers are, and hold them accountable for their actions.

**We can make scammers think twice before making a dial. But we need to make sure that legislation is enacted into law.**

**[It's time to take action against fraudulent callers. Will you join me in calling for Congress to get legislation done?](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc41a91/c1f7015/670f3ce1/1145f0a6/871614550/VEsC/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://www.signherenow.org/petition/stop-scam-robocalls/smith?refcode=em191015robocalls-full&")**

Thanks for your help,

Tina | **U.S. Senator Tina Smith is running for re-election in 2020 in a race _NBC News_ has already labeled a "race to watch" with Donald Trump targeting Minnesota for victory. Make sure she has the resources to fight back.** [CONTRIBUTE](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-oct2019?refcode=em191015robocalls-full-biobox&amount=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&recurring=auto")

name: Amy Mesner, SaraGideon.com
subject: We just finished calculating our fundraising numbers from last quarter.
body:
# [](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802c95/4bef7a87/6b5ad6dd/287fd6b9/749492387/VEsH/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-email-template?refcode=em_header")

Friends - I have news.
Our team just finished calculating our fundraising numbers from last quarter. It took us a while because _so many people_ chipped in to support our campaign.
Here are some important numbers from our FEC report:
* **86,438** \- Number of individual contributions since our campaign launch.
* **$27.56** \- Our average online contribution this quarter.
* **0** \- Number of donations from corporate PACs.

Meanwhile, Susan Collins is raising outrageous sums of money from corporate interests and Trump allies. Two former Mitch McConnell staffers even headlined a high-dollar fundraising event for her!
We're proud to be funding our campaign through small-dollar donations, and grateful to supporters like you for helping us do it. BUT it means we have to work extra hard to keep up with Susan Collins. That's why I have to ask:
[**Will you make a $3 contribution today to help us keep our incredible momentum going? If we want to win, we have to keep pushing as hard as we can.**](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802c95/4bef7a87/6b5ad6dd/287fd6b8/749492387/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTEwMTUtZnVsbCJ9/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-october?refcode=em191015-full")
At the end of the day, Susan Collins only has a rolodex of wealthy donors on her side. We have all of you, and that's why we're going to win.
Thank you for being a part of this.
\- Amy Mesner
Campaign Manager
**Help us keep our grassroots momentum going by making a $3 contribution today. If we want to win, we have to keep pushing.**

| Team,

I'll keep this short because things are about to get underway in Des Moines. I'm incredibly excited to be back in Iowa talking with caucusgoers about issues of substance tonight live on TV.

My challengers may be getting ready to "debate" each other with 30-second sound bites, but, for me, [tonight comes down to hearing directly from the American people and sharing my vision for a stronger future.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbaecc/134673f2/af2a9c5/6997ef2b/322548689/VEsH/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/teambfa?refcode=EM_FR_B2_101519_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")

Michael
