name: Juliana Stratton
subject: I'm on Team Durbin
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
body:
#
Peter,
As Lieutenant Governor of Illinois, I understand just how important it is that we support the elected officials who are steadfast champions for our state--like Senator Dick Durbin. Our communities depend on advocates like him to fight for our families and our values in D.C.
From his leadership in the fight for criminal justice reform, to his passionate pursuit of common sense gun safety legislation, to his consistent dedication to defending affordable health care and lowering prescription drug costs for all Americans, Senator Durbin keeps on showing up for us when it counts--now let's show up for him and support his campaign in this critical moment.
**[Senator Durbin needs us to stand with him now. Can you contribute $5 now to help keep him fighting for all of us in the U.S. Senate?](https://action.dickdurbin.%3D%3D/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dd-juliana-stratton?refcode=em191015&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&addr2=&city=Englewood&state=FL&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**
Senator Durbin and his wife Loretta were early mentors who helped encourage me to get into politics. Their support was instrumental in my first election as a member of the Illinois House of Representatives and again in 2018 when I became the first African-American elected Lieutenant Governor of Illinois.
Senator Durbin is an inspiration to me because he is the definition of a public servant. Through his years of dedication to Illinois and our nation, he has demonstrated how to lead, make progress, and solve the real issues impacting our families.
I'm proud to support Senator Durbin--I hope you'll join me in doing everything we can do to keep him fighting for us in the U.S. Senate.
**[Pitch in $5 to show your support for Senator Durbin's campaign now.](https://action.dickdurbin.%3D%3D/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dd-juliana-stratton?refcode=em191015&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&addr2=&city=Englewood&state=FL&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**
Thank you,
Juliana Stratton
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://action.dickdurbin.%3D%3D/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dd-juliana-stratton?refcode=em191015&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&addr2=&city=Englewood&state=FL&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**

* * *
Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Should you want to unsubscribe, you can [click here](https://action.dickdurbin.com/page/m/45ff4c5c/42ab3cf4/6194498c/135d4117/629876203/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "http://action.dickdurbin.com/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). Join Senator Durbin in taking on powerful special interests on behalf of hard-working middle class families by [making a contribution to our campaign here.](https://action.dickdurbin.com/page/m/45ff4c5c/42ab3cf4/6194498c/135d4118/629876203/VEsD/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/durbin_footer")

101 W. Grand, Suite 200
Chicago, IL 60654

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: Your vote could help retake the Supreme Court from Mitch McConnell
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Peter, Last week, we told you about how the Supreme Court was hearing three cases that could determine the future of LGBTQ rights and anti-discrimination laws for generations. And after listening to the oral arguments, we're not feeling optimistic about the outcomes. These cases might all come down to Justice Neil Gorsuch, a Trump-appointee, and whether he believes that gender and sex discrimination are important enough for him to care about. Mitch McConnell stole his seat from Barack Obama's pick, Merrick Garland, by refusing to do his constitutional duty as Senate Majority Leader and even hold a hearing, let alone a vote. The Court will also be hearing several other groundbreaking and generation-defining cases this term, including an abortion case from Louisiana and a challenge to the Trump administration's undoing of DACA, the program allowing people who came to this country as children to stay and work without fear of deportation. These decisions will have lasting impacts for generations, no matter how these decisions fall, setting legal precedent for decades. This is why it's so critical that we retake the Senate. If Mitch McConnell is allowed to continue his obstructionist, anti-progress crusade against Democrats, he'll stand in the way of every appointee that doesn't fit his conservative, narrow definition of America. We're ready to send Mitch packing and fight back against the GOP's deliberate manipulation of the highest court in the land by laying early groundwork in 2019 so we win in 2020. [**Can you help us retake the Senate and fight the GOP 's corporate money and illegal electioneering and vote-stealing by donating just $1 today? clean_body: | | | Peter, Last week, we told you about how the Supreme Court was hearing three cases that could determine the future of LGBTQ rights and anti-discrimination laws for generations. And after listening to the oral arguments, we're not feeling optimistic about the outcomes. These cases might all come down to Justice Neil Gorsuch, a Trump-appointee, and whether he believes that gender and sex discrimination are important enough for him to care about. Mitch McConnell stole his seat from Barack Obama's pick, Merrick Garland, by refusing to do his constitutional duty as Senate Majority Leader and even hold a hearing, let alone a vote. The Court will also be hearing several other groundbreaking and generation-defining cases this term, including an abortion case from Louisiana and a challenge to the Trump administration's undoing of DACA, the program allowing people who came to this country as children to stay and work without fear of deportation. These decisions will have lasting impacts for generations, no matter how these decisions fall, setting legal precedent for decades. This is why it's so critical that we retake the Senate. If Mitch McConnell is allowed to continue his obstructionist, anti-progress crusade against Democrats, he'll stand in the way of every appointee that doesn't fit his conservative, narrow definition of America. We're ready to send Mitch packing and fight back against the GOP's deliberate manipulation of the highest court in the land by laying early groundwork in 2019 so we win in 2020. "" Thank you for standing with us, The WDTO Team "" | | | Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC PO Box 15320 Washington, DC 20003 ""

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Watch: Little League World Series champs meet President Trump!
body:
The winners of the 2019 Little League World Series and Softball Little League World Series capped off great seasons with a memorable visit... | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=673a3022b5&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • October 15, 2019
---
| | |
# **Watch: Little League World Series champs meet President Trump!**
---
| [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=c58e9e306b&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| **The winners** of the 2019 Little League World Series and Softball Little League World Series capped off great seasons with a memorable visit to the White House on Friday.

**While in the Oval Office** , players from Louisiana’s Eastbank All-Stars and North Carolina’s Rowan Little League softball team got the opportunity of a lifetime: a chance to meet and take pictures with the President of the United States.

**“This is just** a celebration trip, a culmination of a long hard summer and winning the World Series championship,” Rowan coach Steve Yang told the _Salisbury Post_. He said “the players were awe-struck” as President Donald J. Trump made them feel right at home.

**One more surprise** was in store for the Eastbank All-Stars: As it so happened, President Trump was heading to their home state of Louisiana later that day. So he asked the parents if their kids could fly back in style—aboard Air Force One. The invitation was accepted, giving the Little League World Series champions a season they won’t forget.

[The “trip of a lifetime” for the Eastbank All-Stars!](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=08fd193753&e=3ee4985eea)

**More:**[Rowan Little League softball team visits White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=4e0819cd5f&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## **President Trump scores huge ‘phase 1’ deal with China**

**On Friday,** President Trump delivered a major announcement on progress regarding trade negotiations with China—one that spells out big wins ahead for American workers and for our terrific farming community.

**President Trump:** [America and China come to a substantial “phase one deal.”](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=05f0d9a60a&e=3ee4985eea)

**After meeting** with China’s Vice Premier at the White House, President Trump announced that terms have been reached in principle over some of the most important issues facing American businesses. Those topics included protection of U.S. intellectual property and the opening of Chinese markets to our financial services products.

**But perhaps the biggest win** was securing the purchase of American agricultural goods to the tune of _$40-50 billion_.

**“I’m very excited** for the farmer because there’s never been a deal of this magnitude for the American farmer,” President Trump said. The China deal will be “the largest order in the history of agriculture, by far—by two and a half times.”

**President Trump** correctly understands what past American leaders did not: When it comes to trade with China, the United States has a stronger hand. Previous administrations stood down in the face of confrontation with Beijing, putting media and global popularity points above the interests of American workers. Real negotiation takes time, but Americans know that President Trump won’t back down until he gets results.

**“It****took us a long time** to get here, but it’s something that’s going to be great for China and great for the USA.”

**🎬****President Trump:** [Tremendous news for our farmers!](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=c67e409495&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## Photo of the Day
---
|
---
Official White House Photo by Shealah Craighead
| **President Trump greets the 2019 Stanley Cup Champions, the St. Louis Blues, in the Oval Office** | October 15, 2019
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=ea2fe2fcfa&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=2ae8f65899&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=e840efa1cc)

name: Shannon Salk, Team Hick
subject: A mountain of cash
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado
body:
There's no way to minimize this: Cory Gardner has a mountain of cash right now. And with corporate PACs and special interests lining up behind him, catching up to him is going to be about as difficult | | | [](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/637714b4/691c9bd/6fc3ad89/11a7926c/1248478009/VEsH/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-oct?refcode=em_template")
---
| Friend,

There's no way to minimize this: Cory Gardner has a mountain of cash right now. And with corporate PACs and special interests lining up behind him, catching up to him is going to be about as difficult as scaling a fourteener on a 95 degree day.

But like any good hike, with perseverance and grit, I know we're going to make it.

[**_Our mid-month deadline is coming up in just a few hours --can you chip in to make sure we reach our goal?_**](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-oct?refcode=em_fr_20191015_SS_20191015-fr-SS-midmonth-all_all_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=")

Gardner started this month with a significant head start on the fundraising front. But this team has stepped up in a big way these past few weeks, and as we close in on our mid-month deadline we're finding ourselves just $9,600 away from our goal.

Reaching it will bring us that much closer to closing the gap with Gardner's campaign and that much closer to new leadership in Washington.

**Team, that 's a view that would make any hike worth it. We need your help right now to maintain our progress--can you chip in before midnight tonight?** _If you've saved your information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through right away._ [**_DONATE $5 NOW_**](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-oct?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=em_fr_20191015_SS_20191015-fr-SS-midmonth-all_all_expresslane5&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=")

name: Bill Weld
subject: an important campaign update
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Weld for President 2020 Presidential Campaign Committee · United States
body:
|
---
[](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U22QTbrxfBbsWSKLnwes7AeDwuG0almTZT7rKwoxdnpXGGoPCj2QsDa1RarYtNEfzxY&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191015_fr_s&n=1) Friend — I wanted to give you an important update about our campaign. According to a new Franklin Pierce University-Boston Herald poll, we’re gaining ground on President Trump in New Hampshire! Not only did the president’s job approval rating drop even lower when Republican voters were asked who they'd vote for if the primary were held today, **President Trump dropped 17 points since they polled them last month.** **17 points! In one month!** Then, when the pollsters asked voters who they’d vote for in a general election, a generic Democratic candidate vs President Trump, **Trump only polled at 32%.** **32%!** And if these two data points weren’t good enough news for us, **the poll also found that our support has grown by 11 points since September!** This poll is proof that our plan is working. Our message of change, for our party and country, is resonating with voters in New Hampshire — a key state for us as we try to make Trump a one-term president. This poll is extremely promising, but if we want to keep this momentum, we’re going to need you to help us keep our team going. When I emailed you earlier this week, I told you that I wanted my team to raise another $100,000 online by the end of October, but now this poll has me rethinking our goals. So I've directed our team to raise **$150,000 online by the end of the month so that we can capitalize on this pivotal moment.** [**Do you think you could help the team out by rushing a donation today? I can’t impress upon you how important it is that we raise these funds by the end of the month.**](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U22QTbrxfBbsWSKLnwes7AeDwuG0almTZT7rKwoxdnpXGGoPCj2QsDa1RarYtNEfzxY&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191015_fr_s&n=2) | | [DONATE ⇨](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U22QTbrxfBbsWSKLnwes7AeDwuG0almTZT7rKwoxdnpXGGoPCj2QsDa1RarYtNEfzxY&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191015_fr_s&n=3)

name: Team Fair Fight
subject: It's time to #AskAboutDemocracy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fair Fight PAC, www
body:
Now more than ever, we need a national conversation about threats to our democracy. |
---
[](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa561/34a064cc/18db311f/7030779/3640765598/VEsH/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://fairfight.com/")

| | | Friend - Tonight's presidential debate in Ohio will highlight the choice that we as Americans have before us next November. In 2020, voters will decide the direction of our country and the kind of future we'll build together by casting a ballot. But tens of thousands of voters in Ohio may have been denied their constitutional right to vote, if not for the heroic work of volunteers and voting rights advocates, due to improper voter roll purges. That's because Ohio, like Georgia, has a history of purging voters for political benefit. Most recently, Ohio planned to remove 235,000 voters from the rolls until volunteers and voting rights advocates identified nearly 40,000 voters wrongly included on the purge list. [**Now more than ever, we need a national conversation about threats to our democracy. **](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa561/34a064cc/18db311f/7030786/3640765598/VEsE/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "http://secure.fairfightaction.com/j/step/ask-about-democracy?source=IE101519DEBATE")**[Add your name if you share our belief that tonight 's debate should address the realities of voter suppression and the need for election reform.](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa561/34a064cc/18db311f/7030786/3640765598/VEsF/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "http://secure.fairfightaction.com/j/step/ask-about-democracy?source=IE101519DEBATE")** Across our country, voters face a growing threat from a time-tested voter suppression tactic called voter purging, where seemingly neutral rules for removing voters who have died or left the state have become tools for political benefit to silence the voices of thousands of voters. We know that no assault on our democracy will ever be limited to its targets. And the unfortunate truth is that for Republicans who have used their control over state governments to undermine our democracy, these improprieties are a feature, not a flaw. Thank you for all you do for voting rights,
Team Fair Fight
---
**[donate](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa561/34a064cc/18db311f/7030787/3640765598/VEsC/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fairfight-2019?refcode=IE101519DEB")**

|
---
[](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa561/34a064cc/18db311f/7030784/3640765598/VEsD/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://www.facebook.com/FairFightAction/") [](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa561/34a064cc/18db311f/7030785/3640765598/VEsA/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://twitter.com/fairfightaction/") [](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa561/34a064cc/18db311f/7030782/3640765598/VEsB/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://www.instagram.com/fairfightaction/")

name: Cory Booker
subject: I'm about to go on the debate stage in Westerville, Ohio
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
Tonight's the fourth time I'll be walking out on the national stage to debate my fellow Democratic candidates. But this time, there will be 12 candidates on stage -- the most we've had thus far.
| | |
---
| Friend, Tonight's the fourth time I'll be walking out on the national stage to debate my fellow Democratic candidates. But this time, there will be 12 candidates on stage -- the most we've had thus far. **It 'll be crowded up there, but I've never been one to back down from a challenge.** It's no secret that I'm an underdog in this race, and that's why opportunities like this debate mean so much more to a campaign like ours. It's a chance for me to bring bold, progressive ideas into the national conversation -- like proposing a comprehensive plan to combat gun violence, closing the racial wealth gap, and making sure that everyone in this country has access to safe, affordable housing. And I know that the only reason I'm able to be on stage tonight is because of people like you believing enough in this effort to chip in whatever they can. So before I go out there, I just want to say, from the bottom of my heart, thank you. I plan to make you proud. Cory [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-october?refcode=em_fr_20191015_CB_20191015-fr-CB-predebate-actives_actives_contribbutton&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=") _PS: The debate will start at 8 p.m. ET tonight and will air on CNN, CNN en Espa ñol, and CNN International. It will also be livestreaming on **[CNN.com](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0a3d/5fca0d19/77722de5/291fe3f9/639487662/VEsE/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "http://CNN.com")** and [**nytimes.com**](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0a3d/5fca0d19/77722de5/291fe3f8/639487662/VEsF/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "http://nytimes.com"). Be sure to follow along with me on **[Twitter](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0a3d/5fca0d19/77722de5/291fe3c7/639487662/VEsC/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://twitter.com/CoryBooker")** , **[Facebook](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0a3d/5fca0d19/77722de5/291fe3c6/639487662/VEsD/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.facebook.com/corybooker/")** , and **[Instagram](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0a3d/5fca0d19/77722de5/291fe3c5/639487662/VEsA/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.instagram.com/corybooker/")**._
---
| | Paid for by Cory 2020
---

P.O. Box 32009 Newark, NJ 07102 | All content (C) 2019 Cory 2020, All Rights Reserved.
Contributions or gifts to Cory 2020 are not tax deductible.
If you got this message from a friend, [you can add your name now to get email updates directly from Cory 2020.](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0a3d/5fca0d19/77722de5/291fe3c4/639487662/VEsB/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter")
This campaign is moving quickly. If you want the most up-to-date information, follow Cory on [Instagram](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0a3d/5fca0d19/77722de5/291fe3c5/639487662/VEsO/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.instagram.com/corybooker/"), [Twitter](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0a3d/5fca0d19/77722de5/291fe3c7/639487662/VEsP/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://twitter.com/corybooker"), and [Facebook](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0a3d/5fca0d19/77722de5/291fe3c3/639487662/VEsHBQ/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.facebook.com/corybooker").
It's time for leadership that can reignite our spirit of common purpose. That takes all of us. We believe these emails are an important way to stay in touch, but if at any point you'd like to stop getting these updates, you can unsubscribe [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0a3d/5fca0d19/77722de5/291fe3c2/639487662/VEsHBA/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/unsubscribe").
Is this not your preferred email address? You can update your contact info [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0a3d/5fca0d19/77722de5/291fe3c4/639487662/VEsHBw/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter").

body:

**
------------------------------------------------------------
I’m looking through responses to our October Priorities Survey now, but I don’t see one from you. It’s not too late!

I’m counting on your input, Peter, as this campaign really heats up. In the U.S. Senate, I’m focused on one thing: RESULTS. I know you are too. We have to cut through Washington’s noise and focus on what matters, together.

Please, take our official October Priorities Survey now and let me know what matters most to you. (https://secure.winred.com/david-perdue/2019october-issue-survey?utm_source=rc&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2019oct15prospects) It will only take a few seconds.

Thank you for everything.

David

---------- Original message ----------
From: David Perdue
Date: Thursday, October 10^th, 2019
Subject: I need your input here

Peter,

Since coming to the U.S. Senate as an outsider, I’ve been fighting to change Washington from the inside out. However, I can’t do this without YOU.

I’m emailing about an important opportunity to let me know what you think we should be focused on. We’ve just finalized our OFFICIAL October Priorities Survey. Will you take it right now and let me know what matters most to you? (https://secure.winred.com/david-perdue/2019october-issue-survey?utm_source=rc&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2019oct15prospects)
TAKE THE SURVEY (https://secure.winred.com/david-perdue/2019october-issue-survey?utm_source=rc&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2019oct15prospects)
Peter, input from grassroots supporters like you is more critical than ever before!

Radical Democrats are openly embracing socialist policies. Liberal donors are planning to spend hundreds of millions in Georgia and around the country to end our Republican Senate majority. The national liberal media is giving these Democrats constant attention.

We have to cut through the noise to deliver results, but that means we have to focus on what matters. That’s why I want to hear from YOU.

Will you be one of the first to take our official October Priorities Survey RIGHT NOW? (https://secure.winred.com/david-perdue/2019october-issue-survey?utm_source=rc&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2019oct15prospects)

Thank you for your continued input and support.

David
OCTOBER PRIORITIES SURVEY (https://secure.winred.com/david-perdue/2019october-issue-survey?utm_source=rc&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2019oct15prospects)

============================================================
PAID FOR BY PERDUE FOR SENATE
** (https://secure.winred.com/david-perdue/2019october-issue-survey?utm_source=rc&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2019oct15prospects)
We know we send a lot of emails, but the truth is: We're counting on you. David is an outsider, not a career politician. He got elected because of supporters like you. He's counting on your help to continue delivering results. These emails are critical to keeping you updated on ways you can help David make a difference. Thank you for all that you do!
PO Box 12077, Atlanta, GA 30355

Want to change how you receive these emails? We would hate to see you go - these emails are critical to our campaign - but you can ** update your preferences (https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/profile?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=a4d292c925&e=02cd889ad3)
